category_sources: source_facts.description says C code prettifier; GNU indent manual is titled Indent and Format C Program Source.
display_name_sources: GNU indent Savannah summary and manual use GNU indent; source_facts.name is gnu-indent.
docs_sources: Official GNU indent manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/indent/manual.
repo_sources: GNU indent Savannah summary lists Git source code; official Savannah cgit index lists indent.git under GNU indent.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies C code prettifying; GNU indent Savannah summary says it formats C/C++ comments, braces, declarations, and program indentation.
